meaning: n.弯腰,屈背,屈服vi.弯下,弯下上身,屈服,弯腰,堕落vt.俯曲,辱没
examples: I didn't think he'd stoop to cheating.
They will stoop to every lowdown trick.
He tends to stoop because he's so tall.
An average contractor can at least fix your stoop, but an average money manager is worthless.
The Upper Delaware is 138 miles from the front stoop of my apartment in Brooklyn.
